content_gate_description: Hard pause at Sprint 2 Task 3 — user must confirm clinical accuracy of questions.ts and skills.ts before UI build proceeds (CON-005)

sprints.name: Foundation
sprints.focus: Project scaffolding, TypeScript types, design system, PWA configuration
sprints.validation_summary: npm run build exits 0, tsc --noEmit exits 0, dist/manifest.webmanifest and dist/sw.js exist

tasks.name: Vite + React + TypeScript project scaffolding
tasks.description: npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts. Set strict:true in tsconfig.json. Install zustand, @upstash/redis, vite-plugin-pwa, @vitejs/plugin-react. Clear template boilerplate from src/. Verify npm run build exits 0.
tasks.validation: npm run build exits 0. tsc --noEmit exits 0. tsconfig.json contains "strict": true.

tasks.name: TypeScript type definitions (src/types/)
tasks.description: Create 4 type files: src/types/algorithm.ts (QuestionState union, ExposureRecord, QuestionRecord), src/types/session.ts (SessionRecord), src/types/store.ts (AppStore), src/types/content.ts (Question, Skill). Copy interfaces verbatim from blueprint Section 3.
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. QuestionState has 5 values. QuestionRecord has all 10 fields.

tasks.name: Design system CSS (src/styles/globals.css)
tasks.description: Run frontend-design skill first. Implement all design tokens from zzz/design-system/style-template.md as CSS custom properties. Include color tokens, typography (@import Syne + DM Sans), spacing, global resets. Import in src/main.tsx.
tasks.validation: All --color-* variables present. Google Fonts imports present. vite dev serves without CSS errors.

tasks.name: PWA assets + vite.config.ts + index.html iOS meta tags
tasks.description: Create public/icons/icon-192.png, icon-512.png, apple-touch-icon.png. Update vite.config.ts with full VitePWA config (manifest with name/icons/display:standalone/theme_color, registerType:autoUpdate). Add 4 iOS meta tags to index.html.
tasks.validation: npm run build exits 0. dist/manifest.webmanifest exists with display:standalone. dist/sw.js exists. iOS meta tags in index.html.

validation_checks: dist/manifest.webmanifest and dist/sw.js exist after build

sprints.name: Infrastructure & Data
sprints.focus: Upstash Redis, content files, content gate, /api/sync, Zustand store
sprints.user_input_prompt: CONTENT VERIFICATION REQUIRED (CON-005): Review src/data/questions.ts (146 questions) and src/data/skills.ts (12 skills) for clinical accuracy against current St. John Ambulance Alberta guidelines. Reply CONTENT APPROVED to continue.
sprints.validation_summary: Upstash Redis responds, /api/sync works on vercel dev, store persists to localStorage

tasks.name: Infrastructure provisioning (Upstash Redis + Vercel + env vars)
tasks.description: Test Upstash MCP. If accessible: create Redis database fap-backup us-east-1. Else: fallback to Vercel KV. Create Vercel project via CLI. Set UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL and UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN via vercel env add. Test Redis connectivity with curl. Record outcome in SYNTROP/artifacts/architecture/infra-notes.md.
tasks.validation: curl to Redis REST URL returns valid JSON. .vercel/ directory exists. Env vars confirmed in Vercel project.

tasks.name: Content data files (src/data/questions.ts + skills.ts)
tasks.description: Create typed wrappers: src/data/questions.ts (copy questions array from zzz/questions.js, type as Question[], export QUESTION_COUNT=146, TOPICS array, QUESTION_IDS array). src/data/skills.ts (copy skills array from zzz/skills.js, type as Skill[]). DO NOT modify content.
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. questions.length===146. skills.length===12. TOPICS has 11 entries.

tasks.name: CONTENT GATE — Clinical accuracy review
tasks.description: HARD GATE. Display content verification prompt to user. PAUSE execution. Do not proceed to S2-T4 or S2-T5 until user sends CONTENT APPROVED.
tasks.validation: User has responded CONTENT APPROVED in this chat session.

tasks.name: /api/sync serverless function (api/sync.ts)
tasks.description: Create api/sync.ts Vercel serverless function. GET: validate deviceId UUID, redis.get('fap:'+deviceId), return {data, syncedAt}. POST: validate deviceId + data, redis.set key, return {ok:true, syncedAt}. Error handling: try/catch all Redis calls, return {error:'fetch_failed'} or {error:'write_failed'} with 500.
tasks.validation: vercel dev starts. GET /api/sync?deviceId=valid-uuid returns JSON. POST with valid body returns {ok:true}.

tasks.name: Zustand store (src/store/useStore.ts)
tasks.description: Create useStore.ts with persist middleware: name:'fap_store', version:1, storage:createJSONStorage(()=>localStorage), migrate template. All AppStore fields and actions from blueprint Section 8.
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. localStorage entry fap_store appears after app loads. Store rehydrates on page reload.

validation_checks: Upstash Redis responds to test command
Content gate passed: user confirmed clinical accuracy
api/sync.ts handles GET + POST without errors
fap_store appears in localStorage after load

sprints.name: Core Algorithm
sprints.focus: PRNG, device ID, 5-state machine, session builder
sprints.validation_summary: All 5 state transitions verified correct, algorithm test script passes 7 assertions

tasks.name: mulberry32 PRNG + Device ID utility
tasks.description: Create src/lib/prng.ts: mulberry32(seed), seedFromSessionId(sessionId), seededShuffle<T>(). Create src/lib/deviceId.ts: resolveDeviceId() with localStorage→cookie→generate fallback, getCookie, setCookie (7-year SameSite=Strict). Copy implementations verbatim from blueprint Section 7.
tasks.validation: mulberry32(12345) produces same 3 values on repeat calls. seededShuffle deterministic. resolveDeviceId returns UUID and stores in localStorage+cookie.

tasks.name: 5-state algorithm (src/lib/algorithm.ts)
tasks.description: Create src/lib/algorithm.ts: FAST_TAP_MS=2000, isFastTap(), hasReversalInWindow() (checks last 5 for correct-then-incorrect pattern), applyAnswer() pure function (all 5 state transitions per blueprint Section 4), isMaintenanceDue(). All functions pure, no side effects.
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. See S3-T3 for transition verification.

tasks.name: Algorithm validation (manual test script)
tasks.description: Create scripts/test-algorithm.ts. Verify all 7 cases: (1) new+correct→active, (2) active+2correct→near_mastery, (3) near_mastery+3correct(1session)→NOT mastered, (4) near_mastery+correct(2sessions)→mastered, (5) mastered+miss→active, (6) fast-tap→unchanged, (7) reversal present→blocks mastery. Run with npx tsx. All assertions pass. Delete script after.
tasks.validation: Script runs with 'ALL TESTS PASSED' output and exits 0.

tasks.name: Session builder (src/lib/sessionBuilder.ts)
tasks.description: Create src/lib/sessionBuilder.ts: buildSessionQueue(questionRecords, sessionNumber, sessionId): string[]. Classify into ACTIVE_NEW, NEAR_MASTERY, MAINTENANCE_DUE tiers. Shuffle each tier with seededShuffle(mulberry32(seedFromSessionId(sessionId))). Assemble with 1:5 near_mastery interleave. Return array of question IDs.
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. ACTIVE before NEAR_MASTERY. MAINTENANCE at end. Same sessionId produces same order.

validation_checks: src/lib/deviceId.ts — UUID stored in localStorage + cookie
Algorithm test script: all 7 assertions pass

sprints.name: Hooks & Analytics
sprints.validation_summary: useSession starts session and records answers correctly, useSync triggers POST on manualSave

tasks.name: Analytics computations (src/lib/analytics.ts)
tasks.description: Create src/lib/analytics.ts: TopicStat interface, computeTopicStats(questionRecords), computeEstimatedScore(topicStats) using weighted formula, isReadyToTest(topicStats, score) (all topics >= 75% AND score >= 80).
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. 25 CPR questions mastered → CPR topic 100% green. All new → score 0. isReadyToTest false at 0%.

tasks.name: useSession hook (src/hooks/useSession.ts)
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useSession.ts: startSession() (generate UUID, build queue, create SessionRecord in store), markQuestionDisplayed() (set questionDisplayTime=Date.now()), recordAnswer(correct, answerTime) (isFastTap check, apply state transition or add to fastTapPending, advance index), nextQuestion() (flush fastTapPending if queue exhausted, set isComplete), getCurrentQuestion(), endSession() (clear session, markDirty).
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. startSession creates SessionRecord in store. recordAnswer updates QuestionRecord. fastTapPending populated on fast answers.

tasks.name: useSync hook (src/hooks/useSync.ts)
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useSync.ts: auto-sync useEffect (setInterval 60s, POST /api/sync when isDirty, markClean on success), manualSave() (POST, update store), restoreBackup() (GET, merge questions into store on success). Returns {manualSave, restoreBackup}.
tasks.validation: tsc --noEmit exits 0. manualSave sends POST, lastSyncAt updates on success. restoreBackup returns no_backup_found when Redis has no data.

validation_checks: src/lib/analytics.ts — correct mastery% for known state sets
src/hooks/useSession.ts — session starts, answers recorded, fast-tap buffered
src/hooks/useSync.ts — manualSave triggers POST, restoreBackup triggers GET

sprints.name: Study Tab UI
sprints.focus: Question display, answer selection, feedback, session orchestration
sprints.validation_summary: App opens to question, full session flow works, fast-tap warning appears

tasks.name: AnswerOption component
tasks.description: Create src/components/study/AnswerOption.tsx. Props: text, index, selectedIndex|null, correctIndex, onSelect. 4 visual states using design system colors. Disabled after selection. Min 44px touch target.
tasks.validation: Idle: all options neutral. After selection: selected shows correct/incorrect, correctIndex revealed, others dimmed.

tasks.name: ExplanationPanel component
tasks.description: Create src/components/study/ExplanationPanel.tsx. Props: explanation, isCorrect, isFastTap, onNext. Shows result badge, explanation text, fast-tap warning (when isFastTap=true), Next button.
tasks.validation: Correct badge green, incorrect red. Fast-tap warning visible only when isFastTap=true. onNext fires on button click.

tasks.name: QuestionCard component
tasks.description: Create src/components/study/QuestionCard.tsx. Props: question:Question. On mount: markQuestionDisplayed(). Renders topic label, question text, AnswerOption list. On answer: record answerTime=Date.now(), call useSession().recordAnswer(), set selectedIndex. Show ExplanationPanel with onNext→nextQuestion.
tasks.validation: Question + 4 options render. Selection shows ExplanationPanel. Next advances to next question.

tasks.name: SessionSummary component
tasks.description: Create src/components/study/SessionSummary.tsx. Reads from Zustand store. Shows: session stats (answered, correct%, fast-taps), state distribution (5 counts). Start New Session button calls useSession().startSession().
tasks.validation: Stats display correctly after session ends. Start New Session button works.

tasks.name: StudyTab component
tasks.description: Create src/components/study/StudyTab.tsx. On mount: if no currentSession, call startSession(). If session.isComplete: render SessionSummary. Else: render QuestionCard with getCurrentQuestion(). Reactive via useStore selector.
tasks.validation: App shows first question immediately on load (SC-001). Queue exhaustion shows SessionSummary. New session works.

validation_checks: App opens to question with zero interactions (SC-001)
Answer selection shows all-option state update
ExplanationPanel with fast-tap warning on quick answers
New session starts with next question

sprints.name: Skills & Progress Tabs
sprints.focus: Practical skills guide and analytics dashboard
sprints.validation_summary: Skills accordion works, Progress tab shows correct mastery data

tasks.name: SkillCard component
tasks.description: Create src/components/skills/SkillCard.tsx. Props: skill:Skill, isExpanded:boolean, onToggle:(). Collapsed: name + category badge. Expanded: + objective, numbered steps, commonErrors, evaluationCriteria. Smooth height animation.
tasks.validation: Collapsed shows only name. Expanded shows all sections. Smooth height animation.

tasks.name: SkillsTab component
tasks.description: Create src/components/skills/SkillsTab.tsx. Imports skills[]. Reads skillsExpandedId from store. Renders 12 SkillCards with accordion logic (setSkillsExpanded). Tab title: Skills Guide.
tasks.validation: 12 skills render. Only one expanded at a time. Expanded state persists across tab switches.

tasks.name: ScoreDisplay component
tasks.description: Create src/components/progress/ScoreDisplay.tsx. Props: estimatedScore:number, isReadyToTest:boolean. Large score number (DM Sans 300 weight, 3rem+). Ready to Test banner when isReadyToTest=true.
tasks.validation: Score renders large. Ready to Test banner visible only when isReadyToTest=true.

tasks.name: TopicGrid + WeakTopics components
tasks.description: Create src/components/progress/TopicGrid.tsx (11-cell grid, color-coded: <50 red, 50-80 yellow, >80 green, using short topic names) and src/components/progress/WeakTopics.tsx (3 lowest mastery% topics, ascending sort).
tasks.validation: 11 cells. All 3 color states verifiable. WeakTopics shows exactly 3 in ascending order.

tasks.name: ProgressTab component
tasks.description: Create src/components/progress/ProgressTab.tsx. Reads questions from store. Computes topicStats, score, ready. Renders ScoreDisplay + TopicGrid + WeakTopics. Auto-updates on question state changes via Zustand selector.
tasks.validation: Progress updates after Study tab activity. Topics show correct colors.

validation_checks: Accordion: single expand, persists across tab switches
Progress tab: 11-topic grid with correct colors
Score updates correctly after answering questions

sprints.name: Settings, Navigation & App Assembly
sprints.focus: Settings, bottom nav, iOS banner, AppShell, app entry point
sprints.validation_summary: Full app renders to question with zero console errors, all 4 tabs switch, auto-sync runs

tasks.name: SyncControls component
tasks.description: Create src/components/settings/SyncControls.tsx. Save button (POST /api/sync, loading/success/error states). Restore button (confirm modal → GET /api/sync → restore). Last synced timestamp. Status messages clear after 4s.
tasks.validation: Save button triggers POST, shows Saved with timestamp. Restore shows confirm dialog before acting.

tasks.name: SettingsTab component
tasks.description: Create src/components/settings/SettingsTab.tsx. Mounts useSync (auto-sync starts when mounted). Renders Settings heading + SyncControls + About section.
tasks.validation: Auto-sync triggers after 60s when isDirty=true. SyncControls visible.

tasks.name: BottomNav component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/BottomNav.tsx. 4 items (Study/Skills/Progress/Settings). Active indicator: gradient underline. 44px touch targets. Fixed bottom. iOS safe-area-inset-bottom padding. setActiveTab on tap.
tasks.validation: Active indicator updates on tap. 44px touch targets. iOS safe area padding present.

tasks.name: IOSInstallBanner component
tasks.description: Create src/components/shared/IOSInstallBanner.tsx. Detection: navigator.standalone===false AND iOS UA AND !iosInstallDismissed. Dismissible banner: 'Tap Share → Add to Home Screen'. Dismiss persists in store.
tasks.validation: Appears on iOS UA. Dismisses permanently (persisted). Hidden on Android/desktop.

tasks.name: AppShell component
tasks.description: Create src/components/layout/AppShell.tsx. All 4 tab components always mounted. CSS display:none toggling (not unmounting). Content area padding-bottom for BottomNav. BottomNav fixed at bottom outside content area.
tasks.validation: All 4 tabs switch. React DevTools: all 4 tab components stay mounted during switches. BottomNav doesn't overlap content.

tasks.name: App entry point (src/main.tsx + App.tsx)
tasks.description: src/main.tsx: call resolveDeviceId() and useStore.getState().setDeviceId(id). Call useStore.getState().initializeQuestions(QUESTION_IDS). Render App. src/App.tsx: render AppShell + IOSInstallBanner.
tasks.validation: App opens to question with ZERO console errors. 146 questions in fap_store localStorage. DeviceId set. tsc --noEmit exits 0.

validation_checks: App opens to question: zero console errors
IOSInstallBanner on iOS UA, dismisses permanently
146 questions in localStorage on first load

sprints.name: Deployment & Validation
sprints.focus: Production build, deploy, and full acceptance testing
sprints.validation_summary: All 7 success criteria verified in production

tasks.name: Production build + bundle size verification
tasks.description: Run npm run build. Verify exit 0. Run du -sh dist/ — must be <5MB. Verify dist/manifest.webmanifest and dist/sw.js exist. Verify iOS meta tags in dist/index.html.
tasks.validation: npm run build exits 0. dist/ < 5MB. manifest.webmanifest and sw.js present.

tasks.name: Vercel production deployment
tasks.description: Run vercel deploy --prod. Verify production URL loads. Test /api/sync GET and POST at production URL. Verify service worker activates in Chrome DevTools. Record production URL in SYNTROP/artifacts/architecture/infra-notes.md.
tasks.validation: Production URL loads. /api/sync responds. Service worker registered. No deployment errors.

tasks.name: Acceptance validation (SC-001 through SC-007)
tasks.description: Verify all 7 success criteria from SSOT Section 7 at production URL. Document results in SYNTROP/artifacts/architecture/acceptance-results.md. SC-001 (first question immediate), SC-002 (offline after first load), SC-003 (progress persists), SC-004 (Redis restore works), SC-007 (zero dashboard interaction confirmed).
tasks.validation: acceptance-results.md shows PASS for SC-001, SC-002, SC-003, SC-004, SC-007.
